name: @workweave/router
description_en: One-command installer that points Claude Code, Codex, opencode, or pi at the Weave Router. For pi it also ships the routing extension, loaded via pi.extensions.
description_zh: 一键安装程序，将 Claude Code、Codex、opencode 或 pi 指向 Weave Router。对于 pi，它还通过 pi.extensions 发送路由扩展。
